hero.headline: Stop Running Your Business Manually
hero.subheadline: ThunderHouse finds the bottlenecks in your operation and builds AI systems that eliminate them — so your team focuses on growth, not on reminders, paperwork, and calls that should never happen.

problem.headline: Your team is working hard. The tools aren't.

card1.title: Hours lost to manual reminders
card1.body: Your team spends hours making calls and sending messages that a system could handle automatically.

card2.title: Data entered twice — or more
card2.body: Client data gets submitted, then manually re-entered somewhere else. Every time it moves, errors happen.

card3.title: Systems that don't talk to each other
card3.body: Your CRM, accounting, calendar — all separate. Your people become the connection, and that doesn't scale.

card4.title: AI feels out of reach
card4.body: You know AI could help. But you don't know where to start, what it costs, or who to trust.

services.headline: Three ways we build your AI advantage
services.not_sure: Not sure where to start? Let's figure it out together.

build.name: BUILD
build.tagline: We design and build your digital infrastructure
build.hero_sub: We design and build the digital systems your business runs on — websites, apps, and custom AI automations that work while you sleep.

analyze.name: ANALYZE
analyze.tagline: We turn your data into decisions
analyze.hero_sub: We surface the insights already hiding in your data — so you can make faster, smarter decisions with confidence.

transform.name: TRANSFORM
transform.tagline: We redesign how your business operates and grows
transform.hero_sub: We redesign your operations from the ground up — strategy, marketing, consulting, and the training your team needs to own it.

overview.headline: Everything we do, in one place
overview.sub: Three service pillars. One outcome: your business running smarter.

process.headline: From problem to solution — five clear steps

step1.title: DISCOVER
step1.body: We learn your business, your goals, and your constraints before we touch a single tool.

step2.title: DIAGNOSE
step2.body: We map every bottleneck, gap, and AI opportunity specific to your operation.

step3.title: BUILD
step3.body: We design and develop the right solution — nothing more, nothing less.

step4.title: DEPLOY
step4.body: We install, integrate, and train your team so adoption actually happens.

step5.title: OPTIMIZE
step5.body: We monitor, measure, and improve — because good systems get better over time.

process.full_sub: A repeatable process built for real businesses — transparent, collaborative, and focused on results you can measure.

whyus.headline: We're not a software vendor. We're your implementation partner.

col1.title: Local Expertise
col1.body: We work specifically with Puerto Rican businesses in PR and Orlando. We know your market, your culture, and your clients. We speak your language — literally.

col2.title: End-to-End Ownership
col2.body: We don't hand off. We build, deploy, train your team, and stay. If something isn't working, we fix it — because we own the outcome, not just the deliverable.

col3.title: AI-First Mindset
col3.body: Every solution starts with one question: how can AI make this better? Not AI for the sake of it — AI that saves time, reduces errors, and helps your team do more.

proof.metric_sub: Automated across SMS, WhatsApp, and email.

case1.headline: A full factory operation — automated from order to delivery
case1.body: Roomy Organizers needed their entire workflow connected. ThunderHouse built an end-to-end system linking sales, production, inventory, and fulfillment — no more disconnected spreadsheets or manual handoffs between teams.

case2.headline: Client data in. Government filing out. Zero manual steps.
case2.body: For multiple CPA firms, ThunderHouse built an AI agent where clients submit data through a guided interface. The system automatically validates, formats, and publishes directly to government portals for auditing compliance — cutting processing time dramatically and eliminating re-entry errors.

case3.headline: Your team stopped making reminder calls. Clients still show up.
case3.body: Across medical clinics, non-profit agencies, and pet resorts, ThunderHouse replaced manual phone trees with intelligent SMS and WhatsApp automation coordinated with email. Reminders go out automatically. Teams manage everything from one dashboard. No one falls through the cracks.

cta.headline: Ready to stop doing it manually?
cta.note: No pitch. No commitment. Just a real conversation about your operation — in English or Spanish.

contact.headline: Let's Talk About Your Operation
contact.sub: Tell us what you're dealing with. We'll tell you what's possible.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch within one business day.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

about.headline: We Build AI Systems for Real Businesses
about.sub: ThunderHouse is an AI implementation agency built specifically for Puerto Rican businesses in Puerto Rico and Orlando, Florida.
about.mission_body: To make enterprise-level AI implementation accessible to small and mid-size businesses — with the local knowledge, bilingual support, and end-to-end ownership that makes the difference between technology that works and technology that sits unused.
about.market_body: We serve the Puerto Rican business community wherever they operate — from San Juan to Orlando and everywhere in between. We understand the market, the culture, and the unique challenges of building a business in this community.

chat.greeting: Hi! I'm the ThunderHouse AI assistant. What's your biggest operational challenge right now?
chat.cta: Want to talk to a real person? Book a free call →
chat.title: ThunderHouse AI
